title: n8n SDLC ID Mappings
description: Maps workflow names to their n8n IDs for dev/prod separation. Updated by n8n-sdlc-import-project, n8n-sdlc-reserve-workflows, n8n-sdlc-push-workflow, and n8n-sdlc-promote-workflow skills.

workflows.description: Map of workflow names to their dev/prod n8n IDs. Keys are the PROD workflow name (the real name as it appears in n8n, e.g., 'Support Agent', 'List Invoices').

externalDependencies.description: Workflows referenced by in-project workflows but belonging to a different n8n project. Never pulled or modified. Same ID used in both DEV and PROD (no transformation during promotion).

reservedSlots.description: Unclaimed workflow slots. Workflows created by user in n8n but not yet assigned to a dev/prod role.

type.description: Workflow type: 'agent' for AI-powered workflows (contain @n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.* nodes), 'tool' for plain automation workflows

localPath.description: Relative folder path where this workflow's JSON files are stored (e.g., 'agents/', 'tools/', 'agents/agents/'). File name is derived from the workflow name. Self-healed if files are moved.

id.description: n8n workflow ID. Null means slot needs to be reserved.

status.description: Current state of this environment slot

lastPromoted.description: When this workflow was last promoted to prod

lastLocalPull.description: When this workflow was last pulled from n8n

lastPush.description: When this workflow was last pushed to n8n

lastPushEnvironment.description: Which environment the last push targeted

lastPromotionBackup.description: File path of the last pre-promotion backup

lastVersionId.description: versionId from n8n at last pull/push (for drift detection)

id.description: n8n workflow ID of the external workflow

referencedBy.description: List of in-project workflow names that reference this external workflow

note.description: Optional note about this dependency (e.g., owner, purpose)

id.description: n8n workflow ID of the unclaimed slot

claimedBy.description: Workflow name this slot was assigned to, or null if unclaimed
